name: Application Lifecycle Management API
description:
This document details the API endpoints used for Application Lifecycle Management (ALM). The calls may include more fields in the future than what's currently specified.

Getting Started

This section contains general information to help you start using the Anaplan API.

URL, IP, and allowlist requirements

To set your allowlists for API calls, see URL, IP, and allowlist requirements

Authentication

Notes:

  • If your workspace uses single sign-on (SSO), your user must be assigned as an Exception User to use basic authentication and obtain an Anaplan authentication token.  For more information on exception users in Anaplan, see  Assign Exception Users in Anapedia.

  • If you are using certificate-based authentication, the ALM API cannot be used under the following conditions:

    • The user is a non-exception user in the Dev Model, and exception user in the Prod Model.
    • The user is a non-exception user in both the Dev and Prod Models.

To use this API, you must send requests using an Anaplan authentication token. This is in the form of a JSON Web Token. This must be in the Authorization header of the API request. For example: Authorization:AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Where {anaplan_auth_token} is replaced with your authentication token. For more information, see Authentication Service API

resourceGroups.name: Change a model's online status
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to change the model’s status to either online, or offline. Ensure the model is in either standard or deployed mode.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

  • Ensure you follow the guidance on this page when you structure the request.

  • Ensure the model is unlocked when you call this endpoint and is unarchived. Archived models return a 422 Archived HTTP Status response.

Example request

curl -X PUT'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/onlineStatus' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'\
-H 'Content-Type: application/json'
--data-raw '{ "status": "online" }'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token
Content-Type: application/json Required

This indicates the preferred response is application/json format.

Request body

Only include the properties listed in this request. Ensure you add statusand either online or offline

{
  "status": "online"
}
JSON element Details
status Required
Must be one of: [”online”, ”offline”]

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 204 No Content HTTP Status with no body.

Error response

Headers

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
400 Error parsing request body as JSON
Unrecognised property detected
Missing mandatory property 'status'
Invalid value for 'status', must be one of [online, offline]		 Check that you’ve only included the properties listed in the request body guidance.
400 Cannot change status when model is in Locked or Archived mode Change the model mode status so it’s unlocked and unarchived.
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the model’s workspace.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID specified in the URL is correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve compatible source model revisions
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to return the list of revisions from your source model that can be synchronized to your target model.

The returned list displays in descending order, by creation date and time. This is consistent with how revisions are displayed in the user interface (UI).

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator for the target and source model workspaces.

  • Ensure you have access to the models.

Example

Endpoint path: https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{targetModelGuid}/alm/syncableRevisions?sourceModelId={sourceModelGuid}

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

JSON element Details
targetModelGuid Required path parameter. This is the target model guid that the user wants to sync the source model to.
sourceModelGuid Required query parameter. The source model guid that contains the revisions.

Example request

curl -L -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/workspaces/ff8081813f9aee3c013f9b06a28a000a/models/A3E7FBE7F67143D18177C2C61E5BCFC8/alm/syncableRevisions?sourceModelId=882EBB062D9147DCBE63749674FAE63F' -H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplanAuthToken}'`

Example 200 response

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "{apiUrl}/2/0/objects/revision"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "revisions": [
        {
            "id": "795731A31D1A47EFB3802EA6355C62C4",
            "name": "C",
            "description": "Some description",
            "createdOn": "2021-03-10T11:31:08Z",
            "createdBy": "c1c46795a04d430ca7b0ac0d993a5796",
            "creationMethod": "User added revision",
            "appliedOn": "2021-03-10T11:31:08Z",
            "appliedBy": "c1c46795a04d430ca7b0ac0d993a5796"
        },
        {
            "id": "E7F72A49B23C43638DC77839D78B33BE",
            "name": "B",
            "createdOn": "2021-03-10T11:28:26Z",
            "createdBy": "c1c46795a04d430ca7b0ac0d993a5796",
            "creationMethod": "User added revision",
            "appliedOn": "2021-03-10T11:28:26Z",
            "appliedBy": "c1c46795a04d430ca7b0ac0d993a5796"
        }
    ]
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
400 Missing 'sourceModelId' request parameter. Specify the sourceModelId. This is mandatory.
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for both models.
404 Not Found One of the models does not exist. Check if the model ID is correct or if you have access to the model.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve latest revision
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to return the latest revision for a specific model. The response is in the same format as in Getting a list of syncable revisions between two models.

If a revision exists, the return list should contain one element only which is the latest revision.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator.

  • Ensure you have access to the models

Example

Endpoint path: https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelGuid}/alm/latestRevision

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Example request

curl -L -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/96F5036A083F48148A550C71E3BBB8E7/alm/latestRevision' -H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplanAuthToken}'

Example 200 response

The response is similar to below.

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/revision"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "revisions": [
        {
            "id": "0E79B89FD214428E8C3A00514B9BE9EE",
            "name": "Revision name",
            "description": "Some description",
            "createdOn": "2021-03-17T14:43:01Z",
            "createdBy": "c1c46795a04d430ca7b0ac0d993a5796",
            "creationMethod": "Model copied",
            "appliedOn": "2021-03-20T09:21:55Z",
            "appliedBy": "c2e86235a08h510ca7b0ad0g993a4318"
        }
    ]
}

If the specified model does not have any revisions, the user receives a 200 response. The body of the response does not return details of the revision. Models that use ALM always have a revision.

Error responses

Headers

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the model.
404 Not Found One of the models does not exist. Check if the model ID is correct or if you have access to the model.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Create a model sync task
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to synchronize across two models.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

  • Ensure the model is unlocked when you call this endpoint and is unarchived. Archived models return a 422 Archived HTTP Status response.

  • This endpoint does not return a comparison report.

  • Use the endpoints from Retrieve compatible source model revisions and Retrieve latest revision, to determine the sourceRevisionId and targetRevisionId for the request body.

Example request

curl -X POST'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/syncTasks' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'\
-H 'Content-Type: application/json'
--data-raw '{ "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>", "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>", "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token
Content-Type: application/json Required

Describes the media type of the request body

Request body

Only include the properties listed in this request to ensure your call is successful.

{
  "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>",
  "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>",
  "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"
}
JSON element Details
sourceRevisionId Required
Must be a string
sourceModelId Required
Must be a string
targetRevisionId Required
Must be a string

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 201 created HTTP status with a response body.

Headers

  • Content-Type: application/json

  • Location: <URL of the created syncTask resource>

Response body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/taskWithUrl"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 201,
        "message": "Created"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskUrl": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/7282C939A7F54B9A88CB39920592F338/alm/syncTasks/6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskState": "IN_PROGRESS",
        "creationTime": 1614618651855
    }
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

For more error responses, see Common errors.

Code Message Required amendments
400 Expected mandatory fields 'sourceRevisionId', 'sourceModelId' and 'targetRevisionId' Add the mandatory fields for the call to be successful.
400 Other messages Check why the model cannot sync. Specific messages may be returned to the user if a model sync cannot be started in any way. For example, if ALM is not enabled for your tenant, or if revision / model IDs are not valid.
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator on the workspaces for both the target and source models.
404 Not found Check if the model ID specified in the URL is correct.
422 Model is archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve model sync task info
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to retrieve information about a specific sync task.

Note: To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

Example request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/syncTasks/{syncTaskId}' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request body

JSON element Details
modelId Required

The ID of the target model
taskId Required

The ID of the sync task

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body.

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/task"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "48B7FB976E8F4FBDAD925EC90BADB4FC",
        "currentStep": "Complete.",
        "result": {
            "successful": true
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1614870183373
    }
}

Successful response with an unsuccessful sync task

If the sync task cannot complete, the reason why this happened is in the task object, inside the result.error object:

Response body

 {
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/task"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "9CF4E79BC78348539A5D994C18A8A18E",
        "currentStep": "Failed.",
        "result": {
            "successful": false,
            "error": {
                "title": "Model Synchronization Failed",
                "messageText": "Your current workspace size is 998.9 MB. The current size of the model is 440.3 MB, but would be 552.9 MB after sync.",
                "subtitle": "Completing this sync would cause your workspace to exceed its size limit of 1.0 GB."
            }
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1615387609842
    }
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the model’s workspace.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID and the sync task ID that are specified in the URLs are correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve sync tasks for a model
resourceGroups.description:
Use this endpoint to return a list of sync tasks for a target model, where the tasks are either in progress, or they were completed within the last 48 hours.

The list is in descending order of when the tasks were created.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

  • A model stores a maximum number of task results. If there are more than say 20,000 results, the system removes some of the older tasks before the 48 hours period expires. If removed, these tasks are not returned by the API.

  • modelGuid is the global unique identifier (guid) of the target model.

Example request

curl -L -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelGuid}/alm/syncTasks' -H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplanAuthToken}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Example 200 response

{
  "meta": {
    "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/task"
  },
  "status": {
    "code": 200,
    "message": "Success"
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "taskId": "4190D7569A21444FAADC5406E2A8D005",
      "taskState": "COMPLETE",
      "creationTime": 1618396930895
    },
    {
      "taskId": "B5313AB57DD642D6938E99CA804A64EC",
      "taskState": "COMPLETE",
      "creationTime": 1618396932385
    }
  ]
}

Error responses

Code Message
403 Forbidden / A user can see the models but is not a Workspace Administrator.
404 Not Found / The specified model does not exist.

resourceGroups.name: Create a revision
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to create a model revision.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

  • Ensure there’s a minimum of one structural change to the model.

  • Ensure the model is in standard mode.

Example request

curl -X POST 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/revisions' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json'
-H '--data-raw '{"name": "<new_revision_title>", "description": "<new_revision_desc>"}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token
Content-Type: application/json Required

Description: This indicates request format is application/json format.

Request parameters

JSON Element Details
modelId Required
The ID of the model with the revision

Request body

{
  "name": "<new_revision_title>",
  "description": "<new_revision_desc>"
}
JSON Element Details
name Required
Must be a string
Must be non-empty
Must be a maximum of 60 characters
description Optional
Must be a string
Must be 250 characters or fewer

Successful response

You receive a 201 CREATED HTTP status with a response body.

Response headers

Content-Type: application/json

Response body

{
   "meta":{
      "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/revision"
   },
   "status":{
      "code": 201,
      "message": "Created"
   },
   "revision": {
      "id": "397FAEF09D8146CF8B537874D3D515D4",
      "name": "Revision-123",
      "description": "A revision capturing some structural changes to my model",
      "createdOn": "2021-02-01T17:19:29Z",
      "createdBy": "2c9ba1a8716147830171970589222302",
      "creationMethod": "User added revision via API",
      "appliedOn": "2021-02-01T17:19:29Z",
      "appliedBy": "2c9ba1a8716147830171970589222302"
   }
}

Error responses

Headers

Content-Type: application/json

For more error responses, see Common errors.

Code **Message Required amendments**
400 The title of your revision tag must be 60 characters or fewer. Check if the specified name field is more than 60 characters.
400 Revision tag descriptions must be 250 characters or fewer. Check if the specified description field is more than 250 characters.
Other messages Check why the revision cannot be created. For example, if ALM is not enabled for your tenant.
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator for both the target and source models.
404 Not Found Check if the specified model ID in the URL is correct. \ Check if the user has access to the model.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve revisions in a model
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to retrieve the list of revisions for a model.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator and can access the model.

Request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/revisions' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request Headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the model with the revisions

Optional query parameters

Parameter Details
appliedAfter Retrieve the revisions made after a specified date

The date format is YYYY-MM-DD

The date must be earlier than in appliedBefore
appliedBefore Retrieve the revisions before a specified date

The date format is YYYY-MM-DD

The date must be later than in appliedAfter
sort Retrieve revisions sorted in dictionary order, ascending or descending, by the specified property. For example, -name sorts the revisions by their names in descending order
limit Retrieves the specified number of revisions only
offset Retrieves revisions starting from the specified value

Successful response

For a successful response, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body that contains the list of revisions. A list only displays if there were revisions.

Response header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "paging": {
            "currentPageSize": 1,
            "offset": 0,
            "totalSize": 1
        },
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/revision"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "revisions": [
        {
            "id": "1B9A346A6CE14318925862FE85080068",
            "name": "First Revision",
            "createdOn": "2021-04-29T12:22:16Z",
            "createdBy": "8a80db9362f64cad0162fa0ab3fe0001",
            "creationMethod": "User added revision"
        }
    ]
}

Error responses

Code Message Required amendments
400 Date query parameter must be of the format 'YYYY-MM-DD' Change the date format for the appliedAfter and appliedBefore query parameters to YYYY-MM-DD
'appliedAfter' must be an earlier date than 'appliedBefore' Change the date of appliedAfter so it’s an earlier date than appliedBefore.
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the specified model.
404 Not Found One of the models does not exist. Check if the model ID is correct or if you have access to the model.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve the models for a specific revision
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call when you need a list of the models that had a specific revision applied to them.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator and can access the model.

Request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/revisions/{revisionId}/appliedToModels' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request Headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the model that contains the revision
revisionId Required

The ID of the revision

Successful response

For a successful response, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body. The response body contains the list of models with the revision (revisionId).

The response includes deleted models where the object contains a "modelDeleted": true field, and omits the modelName and workspaceId fields.

Response header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/revision"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "appliedToModels": [
        {
            "modelId": "1B9A346A6CE14318925862FE85080068",
            "modelName": "Planning Dev",
            "workspaceId": "ff8081813f9aee3c013f9b06a28a000a",
            "appliedBy": "8a80db9362f64cad0162fa0ab3fe0001",
            "appliedOn": "2021-04-29T12:22:16Z",
            "appliedMethod": "User added revision via API"
        },
        {
            "modelId": "52A9A68B177447DCB693ACF2D75F9E77",
            "appliedBy": "8a80db9362f64cad0162fa0ab3fe0001",
            "appliedOn": "2021-04-30T09:56:34Z",
            "appliedMethod": "Revision synchronized",
            "modelDeleted": true
        },
        {
            "modelId": "7282C939A7F54B9A88CB39920592F338",
            "modelName": "Planning Prod",
            "workspaceId": "ff8081813f9aee3c013f9b06a28a000a",
            "appliedBy": "8a80db9362f64cad0162fa0ab3fe0001",
            "appliedOn": "2021-05-01T11:01:25Z",
            "appliedMethod": "Revision synchronized"
        }
    ]
}

Error responses

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the specified model.
404 Not Found The model or revision could not be found. Check if the modelId is correct and that you have access to the model. Otherwise check that the revisionId is correct and that the revision has been applied to the modelId.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Create a full comparison report generation task
resourceGroups.description:
Use this endpoint to start a task that generates a full comparison report between two model revisions.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator and can access the target and source models

  • This endpoint only starts the generation of the comparison report. The response contains a task ID that lets you query the progress of the report that’s run from the Get comparison report generation task info endpoint

Request

curl -X POST 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{targetModelId}/alm/comparisonReportTasks' \ 
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'
-H 'Content-Type: application/json'
--data-raw '{ 
  "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>", 
  "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>", 
  "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"
}'

Request Headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token
Content-Type: application/json Required

Describes the media type of the request body

Request parameters

Parameter Details
targetModelId Required

The ID of the model for the target revision

Request body

{ 
  "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>", 
  "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>", 
  "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"
}
JSON element Details
sourceRevisionId Required

The ID of the source revision

Must be a string
sourceModelId Required

The ID of the model for the source revision

Must be a string
targetRevisionId Required

The ID of the target revision

Must be a string

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 201 created HTTP status with a response body.

Headers

  • Content-Type: application/json

  • Location: <URL of the created comparison report generated task>

Response body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/taskWithUrl"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 201,
        "message": "Created"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskUrl": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/7282C939A7F54B9A88CB39920592F338/alm/comparisonReportTasks/6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskState": "IN_PROGRESS",
        "creationTime": 1614618651855
    }
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

For more error responses, see Common errors.

Code Message Required amendments
400 Expected mandatory fields 'sourceRevisionId', 'sourceModelId' and 'targetRevisionId' Add the mandatory fields for the call to be successful.
Other messages Check why the model cannot sync.
Specific messages may be returned to the user if a a comparison report could not be generated. For example, if some revisions or model IDs are invalid or SSO restrictions apply.
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator on the workspaces for both the target and source models.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID specified in the URL is correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that's not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve the info for a full comparison report generation task
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to retrieve information about a specific comparison report generation task.
A successful response contains a link that you can use to download the comparison report file.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a Workspace Administrator.

Request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/comparisonReportTasks/{taskId}' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request Headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the target model
taskId Required

The ID of the report generation task

Successful response

If successful, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body.

Response header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/syncTask"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "48B7FB976E8F4FBDAD925EC90BADB4FC",
        "currentStep": "Complete.",
        "result": {
            "successful": true,
            "targetRevisionId": "795731A31D1A47EFB3802EA6355C62C4",
            "sourceRevisionId": "E7F72A49B23C43638DC77839D78B33BE",
            "reportFileUrl": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/comparisonReports/795731A31D1A47EFB3802EA6355C62C4/E7F72A49B23C43638DC77839D78B33BE"
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1614870183373
    }
}

Successful response with an unsuccessful generation task

If the generation task cannot complete, the task object states why inside the result.error object:

Response body

 {
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/syncTask"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "9CF4E79BC78348539A5D994C18A8A18E",
        "currentStep": "Failed.",
        "result": {
            "successful": false,
            "error": {
                "title": "The target and source revisions are incompatible",
                "messageText": "Please choose a target and source revision that's compatible.",
            }
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1615387609842
    }
}

Error responses

Headers

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the model’s workspace.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID and the sync task ID specified in the URLs are correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve the content for a full comparison report
resourceGroups.description:
Use this endpoint to download the contents of the comparison report for a set of revisions.

Before you use this endpoint, make sure the report is generated and ready to download.

The report is identical to the report in the user interface. Once the report is generated, it’s available for 48 hours. After that time, you need to generate a new report to access it again.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator and can access the target model.

Request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/comparisonReports/{targetRevisionId}/{sourceRevisionId}' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request Headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the target model
targetRevisionId Required

The ID of the target revision
sourceRevisionId Required

The ID of the source revision

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body.

Response header

Content-Type: application/octet-stream

Response 200 body

Note: In the actual response, the columns are separated by tabs rather than spaces.

Source Workspace        ff8081813f9aee3c013f9b06a28a000a Name
Source Model    StarterModel
Source Revision rev2    null
Target Workspace        ff8081813f9aee3c013f9b06a28a000a Name
Target Model    StarterModel
Target Revision rev1    null

=== LISTS ADDED ===
Name    Position        Relative To     Has Workflow    Is Numbered List        Is Organisation Notes   Is Production Data      Has Selective Access    Use Top Level As Default Page
Products        End     -       false   false   false   -       false   false   false

=== MODULES ADDED ===
Name    Position        Relative To     Applies To      Breakback       Time Scale      Notes   Read Access Driver      Read/Write Access Driver        Time Range      Users List Option       Versions
Products over time      End     -       Products        New Line Items: Off     Month   -                       Model Calendar  Show All Users: On      Not Applicable

=== ROLES CHANGED ===
Name    Changes
Full Access     1

=== CHANGES WITHIN LISTS ===
List    Items Added/Moved       Items Deleted   Items Changed   Properties Added        Properties Moved        Properties Deleted      Properties Changed
Products        2       0       0       0       0       0       0

=== LINE ITEMS ADDED ===
Module  Line Item       Position        Relative To     Data Type       Applies To      Tags    Formula Scope   Include Brought Forward Is Breakback Enabled    Is Section Break        Is Summary Line Item    Time Scale      Notes   Read Access Driver      Read/Write Access Driver        Style   Time Range      Use Switchover  Versions
Products over time      Price   End     -       Number  -       -       All     false   false   false   false   Month   -       -       -       Normal  Model Calendar  true    Not Applicable
Products over time      Volume  End     -       Number  -       -       All     false   false   false   false   Month   -       -       -       Normal  Model Calendar  true    Not Applicable

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator for the target model.
404 Not Found Check if the ids specified in the URL are correct. Resubmit the report generation task and monitor its status to check when the report is ready to be downloaded.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Create a summary report generation task
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to start a task that generates a summary report between two model revisions.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator and can access the target and source models.

  • Ensure you follow the guidance on this page when you structure the request.

  • This endpoint only triggers the generation of the summary report. The response contains a task ID that lets you query the progress of the report that’s run from the Get summary report generation task info endpoint.

Example request

curl -X POST 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{targetModelId}/alm/summaryReportTasks' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
  "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>",
  "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>",
  "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"
}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token
Content-Type: application/json Required

Describes the media type of the request body

Request parameters

Parameter Details
targetModelId Required

The ID of the model for the target revision

Request body

{
  "sourceRevisionId": "<revision_to_sync>",
  "sourceModelId": "<source_model_id>",
  "targetRevisionId": "<latest_revision_on_target_model>"
}
JSON element Details
sourceRevisionId Required

The ID of the source revision

Must be a string
sourceModelId Required

The ID of the model for the source revision

Must be a string
targetRevisionId Required

The ID of the target revision

Must be a string

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 201 "Created" HTTP status with a response body.

Headers

  • Content-Type: application/json

  • Location: <URL of the created summary report generated task>

Response body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/taskWithUrl"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 201,
        "message": "Created"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskUrl": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/7282C939A7F54B9A88CB39920592F338/alm/summaryReportTasks/6C283D93A9E64570BF502B8F7AF67A00",
        "taskState": "IN_PROGRESS",
        "creationTime": 1614618651855
    }
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
400 Error parsing request body as JSON Check you have all the right elements in the request body.
Unrecognised property detected Ensure only the supported properties are included in the request body.
Expected mandatory fields 'sourceRevisionId', 'sourceModelId' and 'targetRevisionId' Add the mandatory fields for the call to be successful.
Other messages Check why the model cannot sync.

Specific messages may be returned to the user if a a summary report could not be generated. For example, if some revisions or model IDs are invalid or SSO restrictions apply.
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator on the workspaces for both the target and source models.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID specified in the URL is correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that's not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve the info for a summary report generation task
resourceGroups.description:
Use this call to retrieve information about a specific summary report generation task. A successful response contains a link that you can use to retrieve the summary report contents.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator and have access to the model.

Example request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/summaryReportTasks/{taskId}' \
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the target model
taskId Required

The ID of the report generation task

Successful response

If successful, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body.

Response header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/syncTask"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "48B7FB976E8F4FBDAD925EC90BADB4FC",
        "currentStep": "Complete.",
        "result": {
            "successful": true,
            "targetRevisionId": "795731A31D1A47EFB3802EA6355C62C4",
            "sourceRevisionId": "E7F72A49B23C43638DC77839D78B33BE",
            "reportFileUrl": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/summaryReports/795731A31D1A47EFB3802EA6355C62C4/E7F72A49B23C43638DC77839D78B33BE"
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1614870183373
    }
}

Successful response with an unsuccessful generation task

If the generation task did not complete successfully, the task object states why inside the result.error object:

Response body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/syncTask"
    },
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "task": {
        "taskId": "9CF4E79BC78348539A5D994C18A8A18E",
        "currentStep": "Failed.",
        "result": {
            "successful": false,
            "error": {
                "title": "The target and source revisions are incompatible", 
                "messageText": "Please choose a target and source revision that's compatible.",
            }
        },
        "taskState": "COMPLETE",
        "creationTime": 1615387609842
    }
}

Error responses

Headers

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Ensure the user is a workspace administrator for the model’s workspace.
404 Not Found Check if the model ID and the task ID specified in the URL are correct.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Retrieve the contents for a summary report
resourceGroups.description:
Use this endpoint to retrieve the contents of the summary report, for the given revisions, that was submitted to be generated using Create a summary report generation task endpoint. The report must be completely generated before it can be retrieved. To check the status of the submitted task use Retrieve the info for a summary report generation task. If the report is generated it will be available to all users with appropriate permissions. The report will be identical to the report that can be requested from the UI. If the report is not accessed for a period of time (48 hours by default) it will be deleted and will have to be generated again.

Notes

  • To use this call, you must be a workspace administrator and have access to the target model.

  • If there have been no changes to a type of object between revisions (for example no changes related to list subsets), that type of object will be omitted from the response.

  • If there have been no creations, modifications or deletions of a type of object (a new line item was created but no existing line items have been modified or deleted) those properties will be omitted from the response. See the Response 200 body below for an example.

Example request

curl -X GET 'https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/models/{modelId}/alm/summaryReports/{targetRevisionId}/{sourceRevisionId}' \ 
-H 'Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token}'

Request headers

Header Details
Authorization: AnaplanAuthToken {anaplan_auth_token} Required

The Anaplan authentication token

Request parameters

Parameter Details
modelId Required

The ID of the target model
targetRevisionId Required

The ID of the target revision
sourceRevisionId Required

The ID of the source revision

Successful response

If your response is successful, you receive a 200 OK HTTP status with a response body.

Response header

Content-Type: application/json

Response 200 body

{
    "meta": {
        "schema": "https://api.anaplan.com/2/0/objects/summaryReport"
    },         
    "status": {
        "code": 200,
        "message": "Success"
    },
    "summaryReport": {
        "targetRevisionId": "E7E7D6A8916C429590E9DA900467C452",
        "sourceRevisionId": "8ABF264A02D24948B786D5B0BDE146D7",
        "totals": {
            "modified": 1,
            "deleted": 1,
            "created": 3
        },
        "differences": {
            "lineItems": {
                "created": 1
            },
            "rolesContents": {
                "modified": 1
            },
            "lists": {
                "deleted": 1,
                "created": 1
            },
            "modules": {
                "created": 1
            }
        }
    }
}

Error responses

Header

Content-Type: application/json

Code Message Required amendments
403 Forbidden Check if the user is a workspace administrator on the target model.
404 Not Found Check if the ids specified in the URL are correct. Resubmit report generation task and monitor its status to check when the report is ready to be downloaded.
422 Model is Archived Use a model that is not archived.

resourceGroups.name: Common errors
resourceGroups.description:
Code API Message
400 Check if the content is compatible with JSON format.
Check if the values are compatible with JSON.
An unterminated string was identified. Ensure the string is terminated.
An unterminated JSON object was found. Ensure the object is terminated.
Identified an unrecognized ‘<field_name>’. Amend the content so it only contains applicable fields.
The data provided is not in the expected format. Change the data format.
Found a value with an unexpected string format when <expected_type> was expected.
The request body is null. To continue, change the format to a non-empty state.
